code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Login(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[data,setData]=useState({email:"",password:""});const[error,setError]=useState("");const loginUser=()=>{if(!data.email||!data.password){setError("All fields required");return;}const user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("jobUser"));if(user&&user.email===data.email&&user.password===data.password){navigate("/jobs");}else{setError("Invalid credentials");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Email",onChange:e=>setData({...data,email:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",onChange:e=>setData({...data,password:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:loginUser,children:"Login"})]});}export default Login;
